final_text:
In liquid phase sintering, the dihedral angle θ is given by:

\[
\cos\left(\frac{\theta}{2}\right) = \frac{\gamma_{SS}}{2 \gamma_{SL}}
\]

Here,  
\(\gamma_{SS} = 0.80 \, \text{J/m}^2\)  
\(\gamma_{SL} = 0.45 \, \text{J/m}^2\)

So:

\[
\cos\left(\frac{\theta}{2}\right) = \frac{0.80}{2 \times 0.45} = \frac{0.80}{0.90} \approx 0.8889
\]

\[
\frac{\theta}{2} \approx \cos^{-1}(0.8889) \approx 27.27^\circ
\]
\[
\theta \approx 54.54^\circ
\]

The neck size \(X\) is related to grain size \(G\) by:

\[
X = G \sin\left(\frac{\theta}{2}\right)
\]

With \(G = 20 \, \mu\text{m}\):

\[
X = 20 \times \sin(27.27^\circ) \approx 20 \times 0.458 \approx 9.16 \, \mu\text{m}
\]

Thus the correct option is (C).

[ANSWER]C[/ANSWER]
